audit_items.proof_trace: All KZG verification operations use the precomputed trusted_setup loaded once during Kzg initialization (lib.rs:74-112). The trusted setup is encapsulated in the Kzg struct and all operations (verify_blob_kzg_proof L137, verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch L298, verify_kzg_proof L207) use self.trusted_setup or self.context() which were set during construction. No code path recomputes the setup values.
